topic: Confirm CORS behavior of statsapi.mlb.com when accessed from a github.io browser origin
context: Build is a static GitHub-Pages dashboard that must fetch live MLB data client-side. If CORS blocks requests from https://mondrianaire.github.io, the entire IP2 default (client-side fetch on load) collapses and the fallback (CI-built JSON snapshot) becomes mandatory. Discovery flagged this as the load-bearing technical risk.
question: Does statsapi.mlb.com return a permissive Access-Control-Allow-Origin header on its public /api/v1/ endpoints, allowing browser fetch() from arbitrary origins including https://*.github.io?
acceptance: A confidence-grounded answer (canonical evidence or empirical test) that resolves whether client-side fetch is viable. If unviable, explicit pivot recommendation.
resolution_note: TD resolved inline rather than spawning a sub-agent — canonical evidence is sufficient.
